title: Bengali Chenna Rasgulla (Angoor)

ingredients.title: Other
items: Ghee or water for moistening hands

instruction.title: Step 1: Prepare Chenna
steps: Reduce heat; add lemon juice + water slowly, stir gently.
Let whey separate; strain through muslin, rinse with cold water.
Drain lightly for 30 min; some moisture must remain.

instruction.title: Step 2: Knead Chenna
steps: Knead 8–10 min until soft, smooth, pliable.
Roll into 2–3 cm smooth balls; no cracks.

instruction.title: Step 3: Prepare Sugar Syrup
steps: Boil sugar + water + cardamom in a wide pan.

instruction.title: Step 4: Cook Rasgullas
steps: Rasgullas should double in size. Test by lightly pressing.

instruction.title: Step 5: Serve
steps: Cool in syrup, optionally add rose water.

chefTips: Use fresh, full-fat milk for soft chenna.
Maintain gentle rolling boil, not too vigorous.
Syrup ratio: 1:2 sugar to water is ideal.
